data.title: Ukraine's Zelensky Engages in Talks with Bahrain and Kuwait on Iran Issue
data.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky has engaged in discussions with leaders from Bahrain and Kuwait regarding the situation with Iran. According to Jin10, Zelensky emphasized that once the security situation around Iran stabilizes, trilateral diplomatic efforts to address the conflict with Russia will resume.

data.title: STOCKS | Investors Increase Short Positions in Blue Owl Amid Decline
data.description: Investors are increasing their short positions in Blue Owl Capital, anticipating further declines in the stock's value. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the stock has already lost nearly one-third of its value this year. Despite this significant drop, market participants believe there is still potential for additional downward movement. Blue Owl, known for its asset management services, has faced challenges in maintaining its stock performance, prompting investors to bet against its recovery. The trend reflects broader market sentiments and strategic positioning by investors seeking to capitalize on perceived weaknesses in Blue Owl's financial outlook.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Praises Venezuelan President's Performance
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has expressed commendation for Venezuelan President Delcy Rodríguez, stating that she is doing an excellent job. According to Jin10, Trump's remarks come amid ongoing discussions about Venezuela's political and economic situation. The U.S. administration has been closely monitoring developments in the region, particularly in light of Venezuela's challenges and international relations. Trump's comments highlight the diplomatic interactions between the two nations and the U.S. perspective on Venezuela's leadership.

data.title: Security Issue Causes Temporary Arrival Pause at LaGuardia Airport
data.description: The Federal Aviation Administration (FAA) temporarily halted arrivals at New York City's LaGuardia Airport due to a security concern involving a flight that landed at Newark Liberty International Airport. Bloomberg posted on X, detailing the incident that led to the precautionary measure. The FAA's decision was made to ensure safety and security, affecting incoming flights to LaGuardia. The situation was resolved, and normal operations resumed shortly after the pause. Authorities are investigating the security issue to prevent future occurrences.

data.title: Crypto Led Global Markets After US–Iran Strike, Says Bitwise CIO
data.description:
Matt Hougan argues that with traditional exchanges closed, on-chain markets became the main venue for price discovery.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/crypto-led-global-markets-after-us-iran-strike-says-bitwise-cio/

data.title: Avenue Living Reduces Workforce Amid IPO Considerations
data.description: Canadian investment firm Avenue Living has recently laid off nine salespeople as it explores the possibility of going public. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the company's strategic move in preparation for a potential initial public offering (IPO). The decision to reduce its workforce comes as Avenue Living evaluates its business operations and market conditions to optimize its position for a public listing. The firm, known for its real estate investments, is reportedly assessing various factors that could influence its IPO plans. This development reflects a broader trend among companies seeking to streamline operations and enhance efficiency ahead of entering the public market.

data.title: NASA Launches Recruitment Drive for Engineers and Technologists
data.description: NASA has initiated a recruitment campaign to attract engineers and technologists, following a significant loss of employees to DOGE less than a year ago. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the agency's efforts to replenish its workforce and maintain its technological advancements. The recruitment drive aims to fill the gap left by the departure of thousands of employees, ensuring NASA continues to lead in space exploration and innovation. The agency is seeking skilled professionals to support its ongoing and future missions, emphasizing the importance of a robust team in achieving its objectives. This move underscores NASA's commitment to sustaining its position at the forefront of space technology and exploration.

data.title: Texas Election Results Analyzed in Special Edition Newsletter
data.description: Bloomberg posted on X that a special edition newsletter has been released following the Texas election night. The newsletter, authored by Julie Fine and Josh Wingrove, provides an in-depth analysis of the election outcomes and their implications. The detailed examination aims to offer readers insights into the political shifts and trends observed during the election. The newsletter is part of ongoing coverage to keep the public informed about significant political developments in Texas.

data.title: Prediction markets face rules as CFTC begins rulemaking
data.description:
CFTC prediction market rulemaking shifts oversight: under the CEA, and with White House review, regulators set which event contracts are allowed and safeguards
source: https://coincu.com/news/prediction-markets-face-rules-as-cftc-begins-rulemaking/

data.title: Crossover Markets Secures $31 Million to Enhance Institutional Crypto Trading Network
data.description: Crossover Markets has successfully raised $31 million in a Series B funding round, with Tradeweb leading the investment. Notable participants in this round include Ripple and DRW Venture Capital. According to NS3.AI, the company is now valued at $200 million and intends to utilize the funds to expand CROSSx, its crypto electronic communication network designed for institutional trading. This investment represents a significant advancement in the infrastructure supporting institutional crypto market liquidity.

data.title: Standard Chartered Appointed as Custodian for TP ICAP's Digital Asset Platform
data.description: Standard Chartered has been selected as the digital asset custodian and settlement agent for TP ICAP’s Fusion Digital Assets platform, facilitating institutional trading on a UK-regulated exchange. According to NS3.AI, this collaboration aims to enhance TP ICAP’s transition to a matched-principal trading model, offering improved settlement efficiency and greater client flexibility in custodianship. The partnership is part of Standard Chartered’s broader strategy to expand regulated crypto services and institutional market access, particularly in Asia.

data.title: Bitwise Commits $233,000 to Support Bitcoin Development
data.description: Bitwise Asset Management has announced a donation of $233,000 to support Bitcoin open-source developers. According to NS3.AI, this contribution will be distributed among three nonprofit organizations dedicated to enhancing the Bitcoin ecosystem. Bitwise's initiative is part of its commitment to allocate 10% of the gross profits from its Bitcoin ETF (BITB) annually to support the Bitcoin network. As the BITB ETF continues to expand, Bitwise intends to increase its financial support for critical protocol and security projects that are vital for maintaining the stability of the Bitcoin network.

data.title: ETF Outperforms Major Market Indices Over Five Years
data.description: An exchange-traded fund (ETF) has achieved a remarkable five-year return exceeding 100%, significantly outperforming the MSCI Emerging Markets Index and the Nasdaq 100. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting the ETF's impressive performance compared to these major market indices. This achievement underscores the ETF's strong growth trajectory and its potential appeal to investors seeking robust returns. The ETF's performance is notable in the context of broader market trends, where many indices have struggled to achieve similar growth rates. This success may attract further interest from investors looking for high-performing investment options in the current economic climate.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Briefs French President Macron on U.S. Military Actions in Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump reached out to French President Emmanuel Macron on Wednesday evening to inform him about the United States' military operations in Iran. According to Jin10, this communication underscores the ongoing diplomatic engagements between the U.S. and its allies concerning Middle Eastern affairs. The discussion reflects the strategic importance of maintaining open channels with key international partners amid regional tensions. The specifics of the military actions were not disclosed, but the conversation highlights the significance of international collaboration in addressing geopolitical challenges.

data.title: Hezbollah Leader Calls for End to 'Israeli-American Aggression'
data.description: Hezbollah's leader has expressed a desire for the cessation of what he terms 'Israeli-American aggression' and the withdrawal of Israeli forces from Lebanon. According to Jin10, the statement reflects ongoing tensions in the region, highlighting the complex geopolitical dynamics at play. The call for withdrawal underscores the persistent conflict and the challenges in achieving lasting peace in the area. The situation remains tense as both sides continue to navigate the intricate political landscape.

data.title: U.S. Military Achieves Significant Strategic Gains
data.description: The Long View, institutional investor, posted on X. The United States military has reportedly achieved substantial strategic victories, targeting over 2,000 sites and neutralizing naval forces. Additionally, the U.S. has established air superiority, significantly impacting the operational capabilities of the opposing forces.

data.title: MiniMed's IPO Sparks Debate Over Valuation and Growth Prospects
data.description:
MiniMed, a company specializing in diabetes management devices, is preparing for an initial public offering (IPO) as it separates from Medtronic, a major player in the health sector. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move has generated discussions among analysts regarding whether MiniMed's growth potential supports the valuation it aims to achieve through the IPO.

The debate centers on the company's ability to expand its market presence and enhance its product offerings in a competitive industry. Analysts are scrutinizing MiniMed's financial performance and strategic plans to determine if the anticipated valuation aligns with its future growth trajectory.

As MiniMed steps into the public market, its performance will be closely watched by investors and industry experts, who are eager to see how the company navigates its new phase as an independent entity. The outcome of this IPO could set a precedent for similar companies considering separation from larger conglomerates.

data.title: U.S. to Pay Interest on Tariff Refunds to Importers
data.description: The United States government will be required to pay interest on tariff refunds to importers if requested, according to Jin10. This development highlights the financial implications of tariff policies and their impact on international trade. The decision could affect importers who have been subject to tariffs and are seeking refunds, potentially altering the dynamics of trade negotiations and economic strategies. The move underscores the ongoing complexities in trade relations and the financial responsibilities associated with tariff adjustments.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 74,000 USDT with a 7.63% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 04, 2026, 19:21 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 74,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 74,021.492188 USDT, with a narrowed 7.63% increase in 24 hours.
